en: Simeon Peter, a servant and apostle of Jesus Christ, To those who have obtained a faith of equal standing with ours by the righteousness of our God and Savior Jesus Christ:
zh: 耶穌基督的僕人和使徒西門．彼得，寫信給那靠著我們的 神和救主耶穌基督的義，得著和我們同樣寶貴信心的人。

en: May grace and peace be multiplied to you in the knowledge of God and of Jesus our Lord.
zh: 願恩惠平安，因你們確實認識 神和我們的主耶穌，多多加給你們。

en: His divine power has granted to us all things that pertain to life and godliness, through the knowledge of him who called us to his own glory and excellence,
zh: 神以他神聖的能力，因著我們確實認識那位用自己的榮耀和美善呼召我們的，把一切有關生命和敬虔的事，都賜給了我們。

en: by which he has granted to us his precious and very great promises, so that through them you may become partakers of the divine nature, having escaped from the corruption that is in the world because of sinful desire.
zh: 藉著這些，他把又寶貴又極大的應許賜給了我們，好叫你們既然逃脫世上因私慾而來的敗壞，就可以分享 神的本性。

en: For this very reason, make every effort to supplement your faith with virtue, and virtue with knowledge,
zh: 正因這緣故，你們要多多努力：有了信心，又要增添美德；有了美德，又要增添知識；

en: and knowledge with self-control, and self-control with steadfastness, and steadfastness with godliness,
zh: 有了知識，又要增添節制；有了節制，又要增添忍耐；有了忍耐，又要增添敬虔；

en: and godliness with brotherly affection, and brotherly affection with love.
zh: 有了敬虔，又要增添弟兄的愛；有了弟兄的愛，還要增添神聖的愛。

en: For if these qualities are yours and are increasing, they keep you from being ineffective or unfruitful in the knowledge of our Lord Jesus Christ.
zh: 因為你們有了這幾樣，並且繼續增長，就必叫你們在確實認識我們的主耶穌基督上，不至於閒懶不結果子。

en: For whoever lacks these qualities is so nearsighted that he is blind, having forgotten that he was cleansed from his former sins.
zh: 人若沒有這幾樣，就是近視，簡直是瞎眼的，忘記他過去的罪已經得了潔淨。

en: Therefore, brothers, be all the more diligent to make your calling and election sure, for if you practice these qualities you will never fall.
zh: 所以弟兄們，要更加努力，使你們所蒙的呼召和揀選堅定不移；你們若實行這幾樣，就決不會跌倒。

en: For in this way there will be richly provided for you an entrance into the eternal kingdom of our Lord and Savior Jesus Christ.
zh: 這樣，你們就得著充分的裝備，可以進入我們的主和救主耶穌基督永遠的國。

en: Therefore I intend always to remind you of these qualities, though you know them and are established in the truth that you have.
zh: 因此，你們雖然已經知道這些事，又在你們已有的真道上得到堅固，我還要時常提醒你們。

en: I think it right, as long as I am in this body, to stir you up by way of reminder,
zh: 趁著我還在世上 的時候，我認為應當提醒你們，使你們常常警醒，

en: since I know that the putting off of my body will be soon, as our Lord Jesus Christ made clear to me.
zh: 因為我知道我離世 的時候快到了，正如我們的主耶穌基督清楚指示我的。

en: And I will make every effort so that after my departure you may be able at any time to recall these things.
zh: 我也要努力，使你們在我去世以後，還時常追念這些事。

en: For we did not follow cleverly devised myths when we made known to you the power and coming of our Lord Jesus Christ, but we were eyewitnesses of his majesty.
zh: 我們從前把我們主耶穌基督的大能和降臨的事告訴你們，並不是隨從巧妙捏造傳奇的故事，我們卻是親眼看見過他威榮的人。

en: For when he received honor and glory from God the Father, and the voice was borne to him by the Majestic Glory, "This is my beloved Son, with whom I am well pleased,"
zh: 因為他從父 神得著尊貴榮耀的時候，在極顯赫的榮光中，有這樣的聲音對他說：“這是我的愛子，我所喜悅的。”

en: we ourselves heard this very voice borne from heaven, for we were with him on the holy mountain.
zh: 這從天上發出來的聲音，是我們和他同在聖山上的時候，親自聽見過的。

en: And we have something more sure, the prophetic word, to which you will do well to pay attention as to a lamp shining in a dark place, until the day dawns and the morning star rises in your hearts,
zh: 我們還有先知的話，是更確實的。你們要特別注意它，好像注意照在暗處的明燈，直到天將破曉，晨星在你們心裡出現的時候。

en: knowing this first of all, that no prophecy of Scripture comes from someone's own interpretation.
zh: 最要緊的，你們應當知道：聖經所有的預言，都不是先知自己的見解，

en: For no prophecy was ever produced by the will of man, but men spoke from God as they were carried along by the Holy Spirit.
zh: 因為預言不是出於人意的，而是人受聖靈的感動，說出從 神而來的話。
